meta.title: sona stoic lon toki pona — sitelen pona kin
meta.description: lipu pi sona stoic lon toki pona. lipu li jo e sitelen Lasina en sitelen pona; toki Inli pi lukin ante li lon.

hero.title: sona stoic lon toki pona
hero.subtitle: lipu pi sona stoic li kama sin lon toki pona. nimi lili, sona pona: sitelen pona li lon poka toki pona, la lukin lipu li kama sama pali pi lukin.

why.title: tan seme la kulupu lipu ni li pona?

history.title: toki pi wawa pi sona
history.text: toki pona li wile e ni: sina toki e kon taso. ni li pona tawa nasin stoic: toki lili, nasa lili, sona suli.

style.title: lipu lili, ken lukin lon tenpo ale
style.text: lipu ni li lili li pona tawa pali. sina ken lukin lili lon tenpo suno ale, li kama sin tawa toki wan, li kama sona e ona.

europe.title: sitelen Lasina + sitelen pona
europe.text: toki pona li lon sitelen Lasina, li lon sitelen pona kin. wan li tawa lukin lipu; ante li pana e lukin pi nasin en pi tempo toki.

discovery.title: kulupu wan, nasin wan
discovery.text: kulupu lipu ni li jo e nasin wan: lukin pona, nimi pona, nasin ante ala. sina ken open lon lipu ale, anu o jo e lipu ale sama kulupu wan.

dao-de-jing.title: lipu Dao De Jing lon toki pona
dao-de-jing.author: jan Losi
dao-de-jing.shortDesc: lipu open pi sona Dao lon nasin Chinese Wisdom lon toki pona.
dao-de-jing.longDesc: ijo pi toki suli li kama lon tenpo kama. nasin data en nasin URL li awen pona.

sunzi.title: lipu Sunzi lon toki pona
sunzi.author: jan Sunzi
sunzi.shortDesc: lipu sona pi nasin utala lon nasin bilingual sama ni.
sunzi.longDesc: ijo pi toki suli li kama lon tenpo kama. nasin data en nasin URL li awen pona.

mozi-universal-love.title: lipu Mozi: jan ale o olin lon toki pona
mozi-universal-love.author: jan Mozi
mozi-universal-love.shortDesc: lipu Mozi li jo e slug pona en nasin awen pi sitelen.
mozi-universal-love.longDesc: ijo pi toki suli li kama lon tenpo kama. nasin data en nasin URL li awen pona.

faq.title: toki wile (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: toki lili pi kulupu lipu, sitelen pona, en nasin lukin.

items.q: lipu ni li seme: sona pi nasin stoika kepeken toki pona?
items.a: ni li kulupu lipu pi sona pi nasin stoika. toki ale li toki pona, li toki sin kepeken sitelen pona. nasin ni li pana e lukin lipu pi lete pilin: nimi li lili, sona li wawa, toki len li lili.

items.q: lipu seme li lon kulupu lipu ni?
items.a: lipu pi jan Maku Auleli en jan Epikete en jan Seneka en jan Siselo li lon. lipu ale li jo e nasin lukin sama, tawa lukin lon tenpo suno ale.

items.q: lipu ni li lipu ale anu lipu lili taso?
items.a: lipu ni li lipu ale. ona li lipu lili pi sona wan ala. taso nasin pi pali lipu li pona tawa lukin weka e nasa.

items.q: toki Inli li lon lipu ni anu seme?
items.a: lon. toki Inli li lon tawa ni: sina ken lukin e kon, ken ante e lukin, ken alasa e lon pi sona.
sitelen pona li nasin sitelen tawa toki pona. lon lipu ni la ona li lukin sin: toki sama li lon, taso ona li lon kepeken sitelen. ni li pana e lukin lipu pi lete pilin.

items.q: mi wile sona e sitelen pona tan open lipu anu seme?
items.a: ala. sina ken lukin e toki pona kepeken sitelen Lasina open. sitelen pona li tawa lukin sin pi tenpo lili, li tawa kama sona lon tenpo.

items.q: lipu ni li pona tawa jan pi kama sona lon toki pona anu seme?
items.a: ona li pona tawa jan pi open, taso jan ni o wile awen, o ken lukin sin. sina jan pi open mute la o kama sona tan lipu lili, lon tenpo kama la o tawa lipu ni kepeken kulupu toki.

items.q: jan pi sona seme lon toki pona li pona tawa lipu ni?
items.a: jan pi sona meso li pona mute: ona li ken lukin pona, li ken kama sona sin. jan pi sona suli li kepeken lipu ni tawa pona e nasin toki, tawa awen sama, tawa wawa e sona pi pali pona.

items.q: mi o lukin e lipu ni lon tenpo suno ale kepeken nasin seme?
items.a: o lukin e kipisi lili. o lukin sin e toki sama kepeken sitelen pona. o kama jo e toki wan pi kama lon mute, o kepeken ona tawa lawa e tenpo suno sina.

items.q: lipu ni li lon ilo Kindle en lipu palisa anu seme?
items.a: lon. lipu palisa en lipu pi ilo Kindle li lon. nasin lipu li sama, li wile awen sama lon ilo.

items.q: mi ken kama jo e ijo pona pi sona lipu kepeken nasin seme?
items.a: sina ken kama jo e ijo ni tan lipu pi kulupu lipu. ona li pana e nasin pi kama sona, tawa lukin e toki pona en sitelen pona lon nasin lipu ni.

items.q: lipu ni li ante seme tan lipu ante pi sona stoika?
items.a: ante li lon nasin lukin: toki pona li lili, sitelen pona li pana e lukin sin, toki Inli li lon tawa sona, kulupu toki li pana e awen sama lon lipu ale.

legal.title: lipu lawa
legal.ipValue: lipu en sitelen ale li tan jan lawa anu li jo e wile.
legal.liabilityValue: sona ni li kama sama ni taso.

privacy.title: nasin len
privacy.dataValue: tomo lipu ni li alasa ala e sona pi jan.
privacy.cookiesValue: kuki pi sona lukin ala. taso sitelen tawa YouTube li ken pana e kuki.
privacy.rightsValue: sina wile sona la, o toki tawa mi.
